CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Briggs Matheson - Deputy City Attorney, Office of the City Attorney, 415.554.3919, appearing for the Defendants;
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

No other appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Deputy Chew and City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to both claims in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Alfred Anderson is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. = (302/HEK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alfred Anderson, 510-424-9062 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Briggs Matheson, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 of the Office of the City Attorney for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff did not file an Opposition and was not served with the Demurrer. Defendant provides a copy of the Demurrer to the Plaintiff in Open court. Plaintiff refuses to accept the papers and thows them on the floor as he leaves Dept. 302. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DEPUTY CHEW, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Continued to August 21, 2018. Plaintiff's Opposition is due by 8/8/18. Defendant's Reply is due by 8/15/18.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
